name: Incline Dumbbell Press
resistance_profile: Incline (~30 degrees) biases the clavicular (upper) chest; dumbbells allow a deeper stretch at the bottom than a barbell.
rom_notes: Lower until a comfortable deep stretch across the upper chest; do not let the shoulders roll forward.
cues: Lower under control into the stretch
Press the dumbbells up and slightly together
common_errors: Incline set too steep (turns into a shoulder press)
Short range at the top only
progressions: Add a pause in the stretched position
